_comment: Icon specs. id -> assets/pictures/<category>/<id>.png. prompt is appended to style.txt. Upgrade ids match the in-game bitmap index (upgrade<idx>). Regenerate with build_manifest.py.

icons.prompt: a single gleaming gold coin seen face-on, warm gold (#ecc95c), a soft mythic emblem embossed on its face.
a glowing teal quark mote (#79dede), a small luminous elementary particle with a faint orbiting wisp, ethereal.
a radiant five-point golden star-mote (#f5d674), a premium golden quark, brighter and more ornate than an ordinary quark.
a cluster of two dewy sky-blue ambrosia berries (#9ab6f5) with a small leaf, nectar-like sheen.
a cut cyan diamond gemstone (#84dbe8), faceted, catching the rim light.
a small cluster of faceted periwinkle crystal shards (#b7c8f7), sharp angular cut-stone fragments grouped together, soft inner glow.
a glowing lavender four-point mythos star (#c39bf0), arcane and radiant.
a pair of glowing lavender mythos shards (#c39bf0), twin arcane crystal splinters.
a warm-orange particle mote (#f2a877), a bright energetic spark with a faint motion trail.
a dusty-rose votive offering flame (#ee8f86), a teardrop of soft sacrificial light.
a pink hexagonal essence crystal (#ee8cc6), a glowing six-sided gem of knowledge.
an upward-pointing boost arrow over a cluster of small gold coins and tiny factory shapes — all production rising. Rendered in warm gold and plum tones.
a glowing multiplication 'x' symbol fed by an alchemist's flask — free multipliers from alchemy. Rendered in warm gold and plum tones.
speed chevrons (an accelerator) beside a multiplication 'x' — free accelerators from multipliers. Rendered in warm gold and plum tones.
a multiplication 'x' symbol beside three forward speed chevrons — free multipliers from accelerators. Rendered in warm gold and plum tones.
a worker's hard hat resting on a rising stack of coins — workers improved by investments. Rendered in warm gold and plum tones.
three forward speed chevrons energizing a small gear — accelerators boosting generation. Rendered in warm gold and plum tones.
a small cyan diamond with a rising x1.01 growth curve — prestige compounding production. Rendered in warm gold and plum tones.
an ornate rune-augment sigil over a coin stack — augments buffing investments. Rendered in warm gold and plum tones.
speed chevrons feeding a small printing press — accelerators buffing printers. Rendered in warm gold and plum tones.
speed chevrons feeding a coin-mint stamp — accelerators buffing mints. Rendered in warm gold and plum tones.
speed chevrons beside a cyan diamond — acceleration buffing diamond gain. Rendered in warm gold and plum tones.
a coin-mint stamp blazing with light and a bold x10^100 glow — massive mint multiplier. Rendered in warm gold and plum tones.
a printing press beside a glowing lavender mythos shard — printers powered by mythos shards. Rendered in warm gold and plum tones.
a coin stack beside a lavender four-point mythos star — investments powered by mythos. Rendered in warm gold and plum tones.
a worker's hard hat haloed by a bold exponent '11' power-glow — coin upgrade raised to the 11th power. Rendered in warm gold and plum tones.
a radiant cyan diamond emitting a multiplication 'x' and five speed chevrons — a generous burst of free multipliers and accelerators. Rendered in cyan-diamond and periwinkle tones.
a cyan diamond emitting a multiplication 'x' and four speed chevrons. Rendered in cyan-diamond and periwinkle tones.
a cyan diamond emitting a multiplication 'x' and three speed chevrons. Rendered in cyan-diamond and periwinkle tones.
a cyan diamond emitting a multiplication 'x' and two speed chevrons. Rendered in cyan-diamond and periwinkle tones.
a cyan diamond emitting a multiplication 'x' and one speed chevron. Rendered in cyan-diamond and periwinkle tones.
a single speed chevron bursting with extra energy — a free accelerator boost. Rendered in cyan-diamond and periwinkle tones.
a glowing blue speed rune glyph drawing power from scattered coins. Rendered in cyan-diamond and periwinkle tones.
a glowing duplication rune glyph above small factory buildings. Rendered in cyan-diamond and periwinkle tones.
a glowing speed rune glyph above small factory buildings. Rendered in cyan-diamond and periwinkle tones.

a stylized ant sprinting with speed lines and a +60% tag. Rendered in cyan-diamond and periwinkle tones.

a lavender four-point mythos star radiating an upward production boost. Rendered in arcane lavender mythos tones.

a gold coin haloed by a transcension rebirth swirl — coin production per transcension. Rendered in arcane lavender mythos tones.
